caption: A news broadcast from "NEWS 18 इंडिया" focuses on political developments in Bihar. The screen features a red and white graphic layout with a map of Bihar and the text "सुशासन पर चैलेंज" centered. Several political figures are displayed in inset photos, including individuals identified as "डिप्टी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "संतोष सुमन", and "सुमित कुमार". A man in a white traditional outfit stands with joined hands next to the map. As the sequence progresses, a headline appears at the top reading "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". In the final frame, a photo of "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" appears on the left, and a news ticker at the bottom reads "PM: बिहार के लोगों के". The time "10:04 PM" is visible in the bottom right corner across all frames. The background includes a blurred image of a government building.
